service.description: Core Spark-based reconciliation of two ID DataFrames. Returns DataFrame results for memory-efficient streaming.

parameter.name: df1
parameter.description: First ID DataFrame with compare_id column

parameter.name: df2
parameter.description: Second ID DataFrame with compare_id column

parameter.name: idColumnName
parameter.description: Name of the ID column to compare

parameter.name: onlyInDf1
parameter.description: DataFrame of IDs only in first dataset

parameter.name: onlyInDf2
parameter.description: DataFrame of IDs only in second dataset
